checkin.journal:
Woke up at 7, felt a bit weird - all coming from that Ice cream in evening - definitely not eating haagen das for some time
Quick exercise + mask
Neuro guy - did some basic checks charged an arm and a leg told me to come back again - annoying
Met with guys and dr Mo did IV got Cvitamin and B complex, guys got other stuff
Cosita made an amazing lunch
We had an interview with a guy thought it was a girl for CRM position 
We did have a call - townhall went ok
New ideas were flowing
We went to super
